org.jvnet.jaxb2_commons.xml.bind.model

Interface MEnumLeafInfo<T,C extends T>

    MContained, MCustomizable, MOriginated<MEnumLeafInfoOrigin>, MPackaged, MPackagedTypeInfo<T,C>, MTypeInfo<T,C>
